message:
test(wave-41): add 10 pure data-type tests across 4 modules

transport/error: StreamError and SinkError Debug/Display/From<io::Error>
(first tests for this module).

sync/mutex: LockError and TryLockError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Display.

sync/semaphore: AcquireError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Display.

channel/crash: RestartMode, CrashStatsSnapshot, CrashConfig trait
coverage including Display formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
